findings.description: Insecure deserialization (CWE-502): yaml.load(f) without SafeLoader permits arbitrary Python object construction/RCE if the caller-supplied config path ever points to attacker-influenceable content; fix with yaml.safe_load.

File overlay is applied after env overlay, inverting the documented 'env > file' precedence (lines 3/65), which could silently defeat an environment-based security override; primarily a logic bug, deferred to the logic critic.
